key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: Blended best estimate (75% Marvin floor $1.25 / 25% partial PF3 ramp credit)
Polaris Forge 1–2 energization on disclosed timeline

open_questions: Model lease NPV vs net debt/preferred per SPV; confirm ~280M share count.
Bull **19.3%** does not trigger accumulate; moat/dhando gates block per decision stack.
thesis: Applied Digital builds and operates high-power data centers for AI and HPC workloads. **[Fact]** Tenants pay long-term take-or-pay lease rent for energized megawatts; Applied Digital does not own the GPUs. **[Fact]** FQ3 2026 (Feb 28, 2026) revenue was $126.6 million (+139% YoY) with $44.1 million adjusted EBITDA excluding the held-for-sale Cloud Services segment. **[Fact]** On May 20, 2026 the company announced Polaris Forge 3: a 15-year lease with the same U.S. investment-grade hyperscaler as Delta Forge 1 for 300 MW critical IT load (~$7.5 billion base revenue, ops from August 2027). **[Fact]** Total contracted critical IT load is now **1,200 MW** (net) across **four** campuses with **~$31 billion** base contracted lease revenue (~65% from investment-grade hyperscalers). **[Fact]** GAAP net income to common was $100.9M in FQ3 (includes $59.7M discontinued-operation gain on Cloud Services held-for-sale per `10-Q_20260408_rpt20260228_acc0001144879_26_000030.htm`); equity remains subordinate to secured debt and preferred.
why_market_wrong: The market prices Applied Digital as a speculative AI infrastructure story with binary execution risk, not as a contracted lease book approaching cash-flow breakeven. **[Inference]** GAAP losses, stock-based compensation ($48.9 million in FQ3), and CoreWeave concentration push generalists away before adjusted economics scale with energization. **[Inference]** If 600+ MW energizes on disclosed timelines, forward owner cash flow per share could exceed what a loss-making GAAP multiple implies. There is no clean equity yield curve with one dated payoff; return depends on a campus energization stack over several years.
